expectations.text: Lists at least 5 distinct checklist-related endpoint paths
Shows HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) for the endpoints
expectations.evidence: Table includes Method column with GET, POST, PUT, DELETE. Summary table shows 9 GET, 3 POST, 3 PUT, 3 DELETE

expectations.text: Lists query or path parameters for at least one endpoint
expectations.evidence: Every endpoint has a Parameters column listing query and path parameters with types and required status
Section 2 dedicated to Check Items with GET/POST/GET/DELETE on /checklists/{id}/checkItems and /checklists/{id}/checkItems/{idCheckItem}

expectations.text: Output is organized in a structured, easy-to-scan format
expectations.evidence: Well-organized with 4 numbered sections, markdown tables, summary by HTTP method. Not raw JSON.
